name: Local Brands Farm and Ranch Markets Cooperative
notes: No official website found; on-file website field was already blank and no operator/official site (e.g. Colorado Farmers Markets, Mile High Farmers Markets) claims this market. The on-file Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/lbfarmcoop) matches the co-op's name/address (9971 CR 141, Hesperus, CO 81326) per third-party listings, so it appears to be the legitimate official page, but its content could not be retrieved (Facebook blocks automated fetches; both www and mbasic.facebook.com returned no usable content). No other page claiming to be run by the market itself was found. Third-party aggregators (LocalHarvest, rootseller.app, foodmarketmaker.com, Foraged, BazaarFinder, Manta) consistently list phone 970-799-1090 and products (grass-fed/high-altitude beef, pork, lamb, goat, rabbit, heritage turkey, eggs, chicken, seasonal vegetables/herbs), but per instructions these are excluded as non-official sources, so no fields were populated. Hours, months open, SNAP, email, Instagram, and ADA/organic certification were not clearly stated on any accessible official source.
